# @tyravel/events

Domain events and listeners for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/events
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/events`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/events) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

## Tyravel dependencies

- [@tyravel/container](/reference/generated/packages/container)
- [@tyravel/queue](/reference/generated/packages/queue)
